title: stylisma humistrata
intro: Stylisma humistrata, also known as Coastal Stylisma, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Stylisma humistrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
